name: sj-design
description: Studio Joe design toolkit — Apple-style slide decks, motion primitives, emoji visualizations, and WebGPU scenes (presentation skill), plus a design-system expert that codes, consults, and reviews using patterns distilled from real shipped Studio Joe projects across web, WebGPU, Chrome/Safari, macOS, and iOS (sj-design-expert skill), and a repeatable ingest pipeline (ingest-design-source).
